Ship

Vanquisher

Player Ship Profile

EnginePlayer Vanquisher
Default weapons3
Base techs4
Special traits5
Base health9
Base shield7
Base shield regen6
Base armor7

Has an unknown material encasing all the hull, seemingly making it very sturdy. Its power core seems to be working autonomously.

It comes with three weapons. - Gauss Cannon GAU-186 - Cruise Missiles VX-23 - Plasma Flares HG-168 The weapons can not be copied.

Shield840
Regen60

Radius17

Default Weapons

WeaponStart levelSlotType
Cruise Missiles VX-2301projectile
Gatling Cannon GAU-18602smartGun
Plasma Flares HG-16803projectile

Default Upgrades

TechStart levelWhat it gives
Shield0Increases shield amount and regeneration rate. - Can block heavy hits. - Shield Bonuses scale with player level. Good vs hard hitting weapons.
Armor6Increases health and armor amount. Armor reduces damage by its value per hit. - Can restore health. - armor bonuses scale with player level. Good vs fast hitting weapons.
Engine0Increases acceleration and speed. - Can boost speed. Good in PvP.
Power6Increases power regeneration and maximum power. - Can boost damage output at the cost of power. Good for dealing more damage for longer periods.
